description_long: This is a large military cargo aircraft with a high-wing design and four turbofan engines mounted under the wings. The fuselage is robust and streamlined, with a pronounced nose and a T-tail configuration at the rear. The landing gear is retracted, and the aircraft features multiple access hatches and doors along the fuselage. The wings are swept back and equipped with various aerodynamic surfaces, including flaps and ailerons. The exterior is painted in a dark, matte finish with visible insignia and markings on the tail and fuselage. The aircraft is designed for heavy transport and tactical operations, capable of carrying troops, vehicles, or cargo.
description: A large, dark-painted military cargo aircraft with four engines, swept wings, and a T-tail, featuring visible insignia and robust construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide wingspan, four engines, and the prominent nose and cockpit windows.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the T-tail, engine placement, and visible military markings on the tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the T-tail, engine arrangement, and the full span of the wings.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the other side of the fuselage, wing structure, and additional markings.
attribute_armor_plating: No distinct external armor plating visible; fuselage appears to be standard aircraft skin with no reinforced or modular panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark gray paint scheme with no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: United States flag and colored insignia on the tail, small text and symbols on the fuselage near the cockpit and tail.
